codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit fe9c3fd6fb26dc959fa32d190fe5aedcda022462 and confirmed it adds six focused unit tests in src/core/improve/locator-repair.test.ts that exercise previously uncovered locator-repair branches (non-locator early return, suffix/framePath preservation, exact-removal-only paths, regex/filter candidate generation, and malformed exact-option handling). The feature requirements are met: dedicated co-located test coverage exists, the handoff reports locator-repair.ts at 82.89% statements (>= 80%), and full quality/coverage validation passed.

summary: Feature coverage-locator-repair passes scrutiny. Evidence from the handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff indicates the implementation satisfies expected behavior and verification criteria with no blocking or non-blocking code issues identified.
